howToPlay.title: How to Play Screenshot Roulette
howToPlay.description: Every click is a gamble - discover random screenshots from around the world and compete with others!

game.title: The Game
game.description: Screenshot Roulette gives you access to a vast collection of random screenshots taken by people worldwide. Each click reveals a new mystery - you might find anything from private conversations to secret documents, from funny moments to surprising discoveries.

scoring.title: Earning Points
scoring.description: Climb the leaderboard through various interactions:

points.react: React to a screenshot (funny, shocked, etc.)
points.caption: Add a witty caption to a screenshot
points.like: Get a like on your caption

tips.title: Pro Tips
tips.tip1: Keep clicking - you never know what you'll discover next!
tips.tip2: React quickly to what you find - share your emotions
tips.tip3: Be creative with your captions - funnier captions get more likes
tips.tip4: Check the leaderboard daily - new champions are crowned every day

howToPlay.callToAction: Ready to start discovering secrets? Join the hunt and see what you'll find! 🎯

loading.takingTime: This might take a few seconds

description.ios: To install, tap the share button and choose "Add to Home Screen"
description.desktop: Look for the install icon in your browser's address bar
description.android: Install our app for a better experience and quick access!

welcome.title: Ready for Screenshot Roulette?
welcome.description: Every click reveals a random screenshot from someone's computer somewhere in the world.
welcome.hint: Private messages? Secret documents? Funny conversations? Only one way to find out!
